title.en: China-to-Moldova Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入摩尔多瓦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入摩爾多瓦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Moldova CE/EN-oriented requirements, ISM safety references, ANRE grid-connection process, anti-islanding and protection settings, and transport documentation versus China GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 baselines. Moldova grid is 230/400 V 50 Hz, with access typically routed through Romania corridors from the Giurgiulești Danube corridor because the country is landlocked.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与摩尔多瓦CE/EN导向要求、ISM安全条款、ANRE并网流程、防孤岛与保护设置，以及与中国GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964基线对照。摩尔多瓦电网为230/400 V 50 Hz。该国为内陆国，通常需经罗马尼亚通道从Giurgiulești多瑙河走廊实现通道安排。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與摩爾多瓦CE/EN導向要求、ISM安全條款、ANRE併網流程、防孤島與保護設定，以及與中國GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964基線對照。摩爾多瓦電網為230/400 V 50 Hz。該國為內陸國，通常需經羅馬尼亞通道從Giurgiulești多瑙河走廊完成物流。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, ISM scope determination, ANRE grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Moldova CE/EN-adjacent standards adoption, ANRE grid requirements, customs documentation, Moldelectrica guidance, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、ISM适用范围裁定、ANRE并网批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格摩尔多瓦专业人士核验当前摩尔多瓦CE/EN相关标准采纳、ANRE并网要求、海关文件、Moldelectrica指南及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、ISM適用範圍裁定、ANRE併網批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格摩爾多瓦專業人士核驗當前摩爾多瓦CE/EN相關標準採用、ANRE併網要求、海關文件、Moldelectrica指引及專案需求。

answer_first.en: For solar inverters exported from China to Moldova, key practical gaps are CE/EN-oriented product documentation, ANRE project interconnection conditions, anti-islanding settings for local operation, electrical installation conditions for a 230/400 V 50 Hz power system, and transport documentation for a landlocked route through Romania and Giurgiulești corridor. This does not replace in-use project tests at the target site.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口摩尔多瓦的主要实际差距是CE/EN导向产品文件、ANRE项目并网条件、面向本地运行的防孤岛设置、230/400 V 50 Hz电网下的电气安装条件，以及通过罗马尼亚和Giurgiulești走廊的内陆运输文件。这些不替代目标现场的项目测试。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口摩爾多瓦的主要實際差距是CE/EN導向產品文件、ANRE專案併網條件、面向本地運行的防孤島設定、230/400 V 50 Hz電網下的電氣安裝條件，以及通過羅馬尼亞和Giurgiulești走廊的內陸運輸文件。這些不能替代目標現場專案測試。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
